</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/analysis-runs/{analysis-run}/logs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Stream logs from an AnalysisRun job as Server-Sent Events (SSE).
